ValidationRule.description: The ILV Position can not be changed anymore
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceName__r.InvoiceStatus__c,"Draft"),false, IF( OR( ISCHANGED( RelevantToRevenue__c ), ISCHANGED( ILVPositionDate__c ), ISCHANGED ( CurrencyRateToCHF__c ), $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true ) ,false ,true))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The ILV Position can not be changed anymore since the Invoice is not in Draft anymore. Please get in touch with your Project Manager for assistance. (ILV001)
